cards.name: Under the White Hand
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Wormtongue's Whisper
cards.actionEffect: Wormtongue's Whisper. Unique event logic variant based on UnderTheWhiteHand.

cards.name: Furnaces of Isengard
cards.actionEffect: Furnaces of Isengard. Unique event logic variant based on ChoppingTheTrees.

cards.name: Uruk Vanguard
cards.actionEffect: Uruk Vanguard. Unique event logic variant based on WellEquipedArmy.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: WhatDoesMordorCommand
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Engines from Isengard
cards.quote: Timber, iron, and fire answer Saruman's mind; the furnaces labour and the war-machine rolls.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain +25 proc chance to trigger their army ability this turn.

cards.name: Storm from Orthanc
cards.quote: Saruman's word falls like iron from the tower, and the weary find themselves driven to one more deed.
cards.actionEffect: All friendly units in this hex can action again.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.actionEffect: In radius 2, apply Burning (1 turn) and Fear (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.
